g.text: W_rand | 4.0 | Random Page Read Cost (Seek + Latency)
W_idx | 0.05 | Index Page CPU Processing Cost
0x00 | uint64_t | rel_pages // Total pages on disk
0x08 | uint64_t | rel_tuples // Total rows in table
0x10 | double | rel_width // Avg bytes per tuple
0x08 | int | index_height // Tree levels for IndexScan
0x0C | bool | is_clustered // Impacts random vs seq I/O

ul.li: 1.0 Cost Unit = Time to read 1 sequential 8KB page from disk.
Cost is hardware-independent at the optimizer level.
Calibration occurs during DB startup via micro-benchmarking of I/O.

text.tspan: // C = (H * W_rand) + (S * Pages * W_rand) + (S * Tuples * W_cpu)
// C = (H * W_rand) + (S * Pages * W_rand) + (S * Tuples * W_cpu)
